price.rule: Buyer may pay fixed USD 10 for one public-source micro-audit, then email only public-safe scope details. AI Monkey does not collect payment data on this site.

buyer_gets: One GO / HOLD / NO-GO public-source audit for one earning/value route, AI tool/vendor, bounty-like task, lead source, or workflow opportunity.
delivery_target: Within 24 hours after USD 10 payment confirmation and public-safe scope email are received.
hard_boundary: Do not send OTP or 2FA codes
Do not send API keys, tokens, cookies, localStorage, private keys, or seed phrases
Do not send payment cards, bank data, wallet signing data, KYC, tax, or identity documents
Do not send private screenshots, customer data, full addresses, private phone numbers, claim codes, or gift card codes

income_gate.rule: This public instruction is not income. Count income only after payment or another usable value is actually received and verified.
